F9: The Fast Saga (2021)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $173,005,945Details
International Box Office $546,354,123
Worldwide Box Office $719,360,068
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $14,822,158
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $21,207,663
Total $36,029,821
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Dom Toretto is leading a quiet life off the grid with Letty and his son, little Brian, but they know that danger always lurks just over their peaceful horizon. This time, that threat will force Dom to confront the sins of his past if he’s going to save those he loves most. His crew joins together to stop a world-shattering plot led by the most skilled assassin and high-performance driver they’ve ever encountered: a man who also happens to be Dom’s forsaken brother, Jakob.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$70,043,165 (40.5% of total gross)
Legs:2.47 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:24.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$200,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,179 opening theaters/4,203 max. theaters, 6.2 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $203,456,356

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: June 25th, 2021 (Wide) by Universal
June 25th, 2021 (IMAX) by Universal
International Releases: May 20th, 2021 (Wide) (China)
May 21st, 2021 (Wide) (Egypt)
May 21st, 2021 (Wide) (China)
May 21st, 2021 (Wide) (South Korea)
May 21st, 2021 (Wide) (Russia (CIS))
Video Release: July 30th, 2021 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for sequences of violence and action, and language.
(Rating bulletin 2655 (cert #52936), 11/11/2020)
Running Time: 145 minutes
Franchise: Fast and the Furious
Film format: IMAX: DMR
Plot point: Car Chase
Subgenre: Action Adventure
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: One Race Films, Perfect Storm Entertainment, Original Film, Universal Pictures, Roth Kirschenbaum Films
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Dom Toretto is leading a quiet life off the grid with Letty and his son, little Brian, but they know that danger always lurks just over their peaceful horizon. This time, that threat will force Dom to confront the sins of his past if he’s going to save those he loves most. His crew joins together to stop a world-shattering plot led by the most skilled assassin and high-performance driver they’ve ever encountered: a man who also happens to be Dom’s forsaken brother, Jakob.
